---
title: "<i>British Quarterly Review, The</i>"
---

## <i>British Quarterly Review, The</i>

**Type:** periodical

### About

Macmillan sent CMY a good review of <i>The Dove in the Eagle’s Nest</i> (4 July 1866).

### Letters Mentioning This Organization


---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
